# Apply moves a declaration to a new file.
exec gorelo apply 'Server -> target.go'
exists target.go
exec grep 'type Server' target.go
! exec grep 'type Server' server.go

-- go.mod --
module example.com/test

go 1.21
-- server.go --
package main

type Server struct{}

func NewServer() *Server { return &Server{} }
